sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Ipswich Town are in poor form, winless in their last 7 matches with 4 losses and 1 draw in their last 5. West Ham United have shown mixed results with 1 win, 2 draws, and 2 losses in their last 5, but they managed a 2-0 win against Manchester United recently.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: West Ham have dominated recent head-to-head encounters, winning 4 of the last 5 matches against Ipswich, including a 4-1 victory earlier this season. Both teams have scored in 5 of their last 6 meetings, often with over 2.5 goals.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Ipswich Town struggle defensively, conceding 79 goals (19th in the league), while scoring only 35 (18th). West Ham have scored 43 but conceded 61, indicating vulnerabilities at the back but a stronger attacking threat, led by Jarrod Bowen.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Absences
sections.text: Ipswich miss key players like Sammie Szmodics, impacting their attack, while Liam Delap remains a threat. West Ham’s Jarrod Bowen is in form with 4 goals in the last 5 matches, though they miss Michail Antonio.

sections.subtitle: Match Dynamics
sections.text: Ipswich’s defensive frailties and tendency to concede first (5/5 recent matches) could be exploited by West Ham’s attacking players. West Ham’s inconsistency on the road and tendency to concede (6/7 matches) may give Ipswich scoring opportunities.
